name: standards-refresh.sh picks up a URL added to the registry after earlier refreshes and runs the full scrape tag route chain on it while fresh entries skip
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r45-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && printf '

Encrypt data at rest

All Terraform resources MUST enable encryption.

' > $OUT/a.html && printf '

Prefer const in TypeScript source

All TypeScript files SHALL use const for variables not reassigned.

' > $OUT/b.html && cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e1.err && cat >> $OUT/reg.yaml <e2.err; T=$OUT/out/typescript/r45-new.yaml; grep -q 'WROTE sid=r45-old' e1.err && grep -q 'SKIP sid=r45-old (not due' e2.err && grep -q 'WROTE sid=r45-new' e2.err && grep -q 'linguist_aliases' $T && grep -q 'enforced_by:' $T && grep -q 'no_clause_dropped: true' $T && echo later-added-url-flows-full-chain 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
